evals.prompt: Use talk.md as the base and create the GitLab planning for milestone 2.1.0 - Multitenant billing. Generate requirements and issues in GitLab.
evals.expected_output: Agent calls start_execution_planning first with inferred milestone and source path; respects confirmation gates; does not hand-craft issues without MCP tools.

evals.prompt: Post an internal delivery report on GitLab issue #42 summarizing what changed in my branch vs develop.
evals.expected_output: Agent confirms project_id and issue_iid, summarizes diff, calls add_issue_comment with internal=true.

evals.prompt: Mark issue 15 as done — I finished implementing it.
evals.expected_output: Agent verifies issue is in_progress before setting done; uses atomic set_issue_labels; records spent time; does not skip intermediate status.
